name: Person
description: Human entity, as distinguished from a corporate entity (which is sometimes referred to as an 'artificial person'). ISO20022

attributeList.name: ResidentialStatus
attributeList.description: Residential status of an individual, for example, non-permanent resident. (ISO20022)

attributeList.name: BirthDate
attributeList.description: Date on which a person is born. (ISO20022)

attributeList.name: Nationality
attributeList.description: Specifies the country where a person was born or is legally accepted as belonging to the country. (ISO20022)

attributeList.name: Ethnicity
attributeList.description: The religious identification of the person.

attributeList.name: CivilStatus
attributeList.description: Specifies the civil status of a person (ISO20022 BM)

attributeList.name: JobTitle
attributeList.description: Title of the function in an organisation. (ISO20022)

attributeList.name: PersonNamePrefix
attributeList.description: Specifies the terms used to formally address a person. (ISO20022)
